svg.title: Motivation — Goals & Outcomes: Success Criteria by Theme

g.text: Motivation — Goals & Outcomes: Success Criteria by Theme
Stakeholder Concerns and Hand-Off Points Explicitly Verifiable
Architectural Guidance Available Without Specialist Dependency
AI Agents Produce Fewer Architecture-Drift Corrections
Technology Changes Validated Against Architecture Before Implementation
AI Agents Query Technology Architecture to Identify Constraints
Product Requirements Traceable to Realized Components
AI Agents Traverse Product-Architecture Traceability Chains
Architecture Governance Scales Without Proportional Coordination Overhead
Proven Patterns Promoted and Adopted Across Engagements
